## Role models

Central idea: each discipline has its own modelling ideal (a single “role model”)

Ideal/fundamental theory as the role model (that is always turned to for validation), empirical models as challengers that imitate  
Eg infectious epi \= SIR; climate \= energy balance; economic growth \= Solow

Modelling in areas with no underlying theoretical mechanisms are in an identity crisis e.g. clinical prognosis for some diagnoses (eg MH)

Adopting multiple role models for different domains of model value  
I.e. why is SPI-M a role model for modelling-to-policy
